title: Migrate GitHub bounty intake to autonomous-v1
goal: Replace retired escrow intake language and make GitHub bounty issues produce autonomous-v1 terms and creation-plan inputs.
acceptance_criteria: The issue template, examples, parser, API and MCP output, and docs use autonomous-v1 terminology.
Intake captures rewards, verification mode, immutable hashes, deadlines, initial funding, and creation nonce.
Parsing never creates a retired escrow or treats an issue or comment as funding.
Fixtures reject self-solver eligibility and stale V1 fields and accept a canonical autonomous issue.
Stripe and simulated modes remain separate and tested.

verification_policy.rubric: Both verifier agents must independently confirm every acceptance criterion and all required deterministic checks from public evidence. Either may reject; only matching signatures settle.
